name: Layered Zucchini Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, bring water, 2 tablespoons margarine, and salt to a rolling boil.
2. Remove from heat. Stir in sour cream and potato flakes until combined.
3. Add corn; mix well and set aside.
4. In a large skillet, melt 2 tablespoons margarine. Add zucchini and onion.
5. Stir-fry 2-3 minutes until zucchini is crisp-tender. Remove from heat.
6. Stir in tomatoes, dill, and garlic powder.
7. Spread half of the potato mixture in the bottom of 2-quart bowl.
8. Spoon half of the zucchini mixture over the potato layer.
9. Repeat with remaining ingredients, ending with zucchini layer.
10. Cover; refrigerate overnight or several hours before serving.
